document_name: Comparable AAA Game Development Projects Case Studies
description: Detailed post-mortem analyses and published retrospectives from major open-world AAA game development projects (Red Dead Redemption 2, Cyberpunk 2077, Grand Theft Auto V) including development timelines, cost structures, team sizes, technical challenges encountered, and lessons learned. These serve as empirical reference material for validating timeline assumptions, identifying technical risks, and understanding realistic resource allocation for projects of similar scale.
recency_requirement: Published within last 5 years; prefer case studies from 2018 onward to reflect current technology and development practices
steps_to_find: Access industry publications such as Game Developer Magazine and GDC Vault
Review post-mortem articles published by developers on their studios' blogs and platforms like Gamasutra
Contact original development studios (Rockstar, CD Projekt, Ubisoft) for permission to reference their post-mortem presentations
Search academic databases for peer-reviewed publications on game development project management
Consult with industry consultants and former AAA developers for unpublished insights
access_difficulty: Medium - Post-mortem articles and GDC presentations are often publicly available, but detailed financial and resource data may require direct contact with studios or industry network access. Some studios restrict sensitive project information.

document_name: Current GPU Market Data and Procurement Lead Times
description: Real-time or near-current data on NVIDIA and AMD GPU availability, pricing, lead times, and supply chain status. This includes market reports on component availability forecasts, geopolitical risk factors affecting semiconductor supply chains, and alternative professional-grade GPU options (RTX A6000, Radeon Pro W6800). This data is essential for validating the feasibility of procuring 500 high-performance workstations with specified GPUs and identifying supply chain vulnerabilities.
recency_requirement: Current (within last 3 months); supply chain conditions change rapidly, so data must reflect present-day availability and lead times
steps_to_find: Contact NVIDIA and AMD directly for volume procurement pricing and availability forecasts
Consult with major hardware distributors (CDW, Insight, Softchoice) for current lead times and pricing
Access industry supply chain reports from firms like Gartner, IDC, and Statista on semiconductor availability
Monitor semiconductor industry news sources and trade publications for geopolitical risk updates
Engage with procurement consultants specializing in bulk hardware acquisition for development studios
access_difficulty: Medium - Current pricing and availability are publicly available from distributors and manufacturers, but detailed lead-time forecasts and geopolitical risk analyses may require paid subscriptions or direct relationships with industry analysts and distributors.
